label: Auroral Lattice Suite
description: Auroral Lattice Suite forms a narrow sleeping chamber hewn into the escarpment behind The Prismworn Cask’s basalt-glass vault, its walls glazed to a soot-dark sheen beneath a film of pinned glass dust. A low berth-platform of fused mirror-slag occupies the inner wall, set above a shallow condensate channel that keeps the air cool and mineral-clean. Prismatic baffles at the ceiling break the copper-white twilight into measured bands that fall across seam-line tracery in the floor, preserving the city’s calibrated sightlines even in private quarters. Built-in niches of darkened crystal serve as storage, their edges etched with alignment marks keyed to Lacrymara’s auroral girdle.
